installCommand: cd ../.. && node -e "var f=require('fs'),p='package.json',o=JSON.parse(f.readFileSync(p));o.workspaces=['packages/core','packages/ui','apps/web'];f.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(o,null,2))" && npm install && test -d apps/web/node_modules/next || (mkdir -p apps/web/node_modules && ln -s ../../node_modules/next apps/web/node_modules/next)
